content:
🌟 zerobyte | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating and managing encrypted backups for self-hosted data through a web interface.
✨ Key Features: • Automated backups with encryption, compression, and retention policies powered by Restic • Flexible scheduling for automated backup jobs with fine-grained retention policies • End-to-end encryption • Multi-protocol support (NFS, SMB, WebDAV, SFTP, local directories)
📖 Summary: Zerobyte is a TypeScript-based backup automation tool designed for self-hosters. It leverages Restic to provide a web interface for scheduling, managing, and monitoring encrypted backups across various storage protocols.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
